PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?stage ?label WHERE {
  ?stage wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q4809 .
  ?stage rdfs:label ?label .
  ?stage schema:description ?description .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?description) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , "upper stage") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , "second stage") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , "third stage"))
}
ORDER BY ?label
